sanskrit:
यो यो यां यां तनुं भक्तः श्रद्धयार्चितुमिच्छति।
तस्य तस्याचलां श्रद्धां तामेव विदधाम्यहम्॥
transliteration:
yo yo yāṃ yāṃ tanuṃ bhaktaḥ śraddhayārcitum icchati |
tasya tasyācalāṃ śraddhāṃ tām eva vidadhāmy aham ||
literal_meaning: Whatever form a devotee desires to worship with faith, I steady that very faith in him.
contextual_meaning: The psyche grants unwavering belief in the object one chooses to invest meaning, thereby shaping perception and behavior.
psychological_state: A person experiences confirmation bias strengthened by the unconscious, turning chosen belief into lived reality.
trigger_scenario: A client insists a dating app 'always' brings toxic partners; therapy reveals the app merely mirrors the steady faith they unconsciously invest in the story 'I attract harm'.
anchor_text: Your chosen belief becomes your unshakable truth.
